title: Fence Player Upper
description: Allows players to jump on fences and walls. Configurable through tags!
body:
# Fence Player Upper This mod allows players to jump on fences and walls. That's it! However, there are other details that makes this mod different from other similar ones.

While by default it boosts jumps near fences and walls, this can be changed through the fenceplayerupper:boost_jump tag, allowing players to jump over more blocks or even less! This mod also works on both sides, when it's installed on a server, it allows everyone (including vanilla clients) to hop fences and walls, and when it's installed on a client, it allows the same but on singleplayer.

This mod requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) in order to work.
